Actions.drop_to_link: Drop a Journal Entry, Page, or Action to link a Reference
Actions.ref_not_found: The linked reference could not be found.
Actions.linked_ref_invalid_item: Only Action items can be linked here.
Actions.practitioners_hint: Leave empty for a general action; fill in for a magical rote.
Actions.power_hint: Tags and statuses that typically affect this action's Power. Leave as suggestions, or upgrade to direct tag links by editing on a hero copy.
Actions.outcome_description_placeholder: What does this outcome do in fiction?
Actions.consequences_hint: Free-text consequences. Tags and statuses written with [brackets] become applicable when picked.
Actions.consequence_placeholder: e.g. You become exposed (or scratch a tag).
Actions.app_drop_hint: Drag an Action item from a compendium or world directory here to copy it onto this hero.
Actions.empty_state: No actions yet. Drop one here, or click "New Action".
Actions.drop_only_action: Only Action items can be dropped here.
Actions.open_actions_app_hint: Open the Actions browser for the topmost hero sheet.
Actions.apply_no_actor: No actor associated with this roll.
Actions.apply_restore_needs_name: This Restore Success has no tag or status to restore. Edit the action to add one.
Actions.apply_restore_no_match: No tag or status named "{name}" was found on this actor.
Actions.apply_failed: Couldn't apply that outcome — see console.
Actions.apply_no_target_permission: You don't have permission to apply outcomes to {name}.
Actions.apply_weaken_needs_name: This Weaken Success has no tag or status to weaken. Edit the action to add one.
Actions.apply_weaken_no_match: No tag or status named "{name}" was found on {actor}.
Actions.apply_process_no_limit: That limit no longer exists on the target.
Actions.apply_process_addon_limit: Limits contributed by add-ons can't be changed from chat yet.
Actions.no_targets_in_scene: No tokens in this scene to target.
Actions.no_limits_in_scene: No limits found on visible actors.
Actions.request_note_placeholder: Anything you want the player to keep in mind…
Actions.request_no_heroes: No hero actors found in this world.
Actions.request_take_tooltip: Open the roll dialog with this action prepared.
Actions.request_not_owner: Only the actor's owner can take this roll.
Actions.power_drop_only_tag: Drop a power, weakness, fellowship, or story tag onto this row.
Actions.filter_search_placeholder: Filter by name, practitioner, or example…
Actions.empty_state_filtered: No actions match the current filter.
Actions.success_markup_hint: Free-text Success effects. Use [tag] for a story tag, [status-N] for a status at tier N, [status-] to pick the tier when spending Power, and [tag!] for a single-use tag.
Actions.extra_feats_hint: Narrative bonuses available for 1 Power each.

advance.action: Incrementa un estado de progreso un rango por cada 1 de Poder.

attack.action: Otorga al objetivo un estado nocivo.

bestow.action: Otorga a ti mismo o un aliado nuevas habilidades usando etiquetas.

create.action: Crea un nuevo objeto o ser usando etiquetas.

disrupt.action: Da a tu objetivo un estado o etiqueta que obstaculice.
disrupt.cost: 1 de Poder por rango, 2 de Poder por etiqueta.

enhance.action: Otorga a ti o a un aliado un estado beneficioso.

extra_feat.cost: 1 de Poder por característica adicional o logro menor incluido en la acción.
extra_feat.description: Añade una característica o logro menor a una acción.

influence.action: Otorga a tu objetivo un estado apropiado.

mitigate.cost: 1 de Poder por rango, 2 de Poder por etiqueta.

restore.action: Reduce un estado perjudicial o recupera una etiqueta de poder raspada.
restore.cost: 1 de Poder por rango, 2 de Poder por etiqueta.

weaken.action: Elimina una etiqueta o estado beneficioso de un objetivo.
weaken.cost: 1 de Poder por rango, 2 de Poder por etiqueta.

Settings.hero_limit_hint: The base Limit for hero characters. Lower values create grittier campaigns, higher values feel more heroic.
Settings.custom_dice_hint: Usar los dados temáticos de Legend in the Mist en lugar de dados d6 estándar. Requiere recarga.
Settings.popout_tags_sidebar_hint: Automatically open the Tags sidebar in a pop-out window on load.

Ui.scene_tag_dialog_hint: Define tags, statuses, and limits for this scene.
Ui.drop_general_consequence: Drop a vignette here to use its consequences.
Ui.click_open_context_remove: Click para abrir hoja, Click derecho para eliminar.
Ui.consequence_only_hint: Cuando está marcado, este elemento representa solo una consecuencia sin una amenaza asociada. El nombre de la amenaza no se mostrará en los desafíos.
Ui.context_remove_all_tags: Click derecho para eliminar todas las etiquetas de historia
Ui.dice_roller_hint: Abre la ventana de lanzamiento de dados si el personaje está enlazado al usuario.
Ui.open_fellowship_sheet_hint: Abre la hoja del actor de Hermandad.
Ui.warn_no_fellowship: No se encontró ningún actor de Hermandad en este mundo.
Ui.warn_no_backpack: Este héroe no tiene mochila para recibir etiquetas.
Ui.drag_apply: Arrastra a Actores o a la ventana de Historia para aplicar
Ui.error_no_actor: No se encontró el actor. Por favor, asegúrate de que el actor existe y está configurado correctamente.
Ui.error_no_backpack: No se encontró mochila. Intenta duplicar el actor para resolver este problema.
Ui.error_validating_item: Ha habido un error validando el item. Mira la consola para más información.
Ui.item_transfer_content: Selecciona las etiquetas que quieres transferir a tu mochila.
Ui.party_overview_empty: Aún no hay héroes en el mundo.
Ui.party_overview_hint: Abre un resumen de todos los héroes, sus misiones, debilidades y estados.
Ui.moderate_roll_player_hint: El GM está moderando la tirada. Por favor, espera a su decisión.
Ui.name_consequence: Nombra tu Consecuencia usando [etiqueta] para indicar etiquetas y [etiqueta 0] para indicar estados.
Ui.replace_general_consequence_content: Replace the current general consequence vignette?
Ui.replace_story_theme_content: Replace the current story theme with the dropped one?
Ui.toggle_character_sheet_hint: Alterna la hoja del token controlado (o del personaje asignado). Trae la hoja al frente si está abierta detrás de otra ventana.
Ui.click_to_edit_fellowship: Haz clic para editar la hermandad
Ui.click_to_view_actor: Haz clic para ver el actor
Ui.warn_fellowship_limit: Una hermandad solo puede tener un tema de hermandad.
Ui.warn_fellowship_use_actor: Los temas de hermandad pertenecen a actores de hermandad. Vincula una hermandad arrastrándola a tu hoja de héroe.
Ui.warn_fellowship_not_fellowship: Solo se pueden añadir temas de hermandad a un actor de hermandad.
Ui.warn_fellowship_no_delete: The fellowship actor cannot be deleted.
Ui.warn_fellowship_not_character: The fellowship cannot be assigned as a player character.
Ui.fellowship_setup_cta: Drop a fellowship themebook or themekit here, or click the book icon to browse.
Ui.fellowship_no_theme: No fellowship theme set up yet. Click here to configure.
Ui.fellowship_no_options: No fellowship themebooks or themekits found. Install a content module or create one in the Items directory.
Ui.click_to_edit_story_theme: Haz clic para editar el tema de historia
Ui.roll_consequence: La acción tiene éxito, pero hay consecuencias.
Ui.roll_great_success_consequence:
A Great Success —
the Narrator grants an additional benefit, but there are Consequences.
Ui.roll_rejected: {name} ha rechazado la tirada. Por favor, haz los ajustes necesarios o cierra el diálogo si no tenías intención de tirar.
Ui.sacrifice_painful_price: Scratch all tags in a relevant theme.
Ui.sacrifice_grave_price: Take a tier-6 status (typically death or transformation).
Ui.sacrifice_confirm_painful: This will scratch all tags in {theme}. This can be undone manually from the character sheet.
Ui.sacrifice_confirm_scarring: This will permanently remove {theme} from your character. This cannot be undone.
Ui.sacrifice_theme_scratched: All tags in {theme} have been scratched.
Ui.sacrifice_theme_removed: {theme} has been removed. You may replace it with a new theme.
Ui.roll_sacrifice_failure: In Vain — You pay the full price of your Sacrifice, but nothing is achieved.
Ui.roll_sacrifice_mixed: Fate — You succeed, but you must pay the full price of your Sacrifice.
Ui.roll_sacrifice_success: Miracle — You succeed, and your Sacrifice is lessened by one level.
Ui.roll_success: La acción tiene éxito. No hay consecuencias.
Ui.roll_tracked_success: Puedes forzar la tirada aceptando consecuencias para obtener 1 más de Poder para gastar en efectos.
Ui.roll_quick_success: You may Push Your Luck: accept consequences in exchange for a Great Success (Narrator's discretion).
Ui.no_themebook_improvements: This themebook has no special improvements.
Ui.improve_needed: Mark 3 Improve to select an advancement.
Ui.vignette_description_placeholder: Describe la viñeta en detalle. Usa [etiqueta] para etiquetas y [etiqueta 0] para estados.
Ui.hero_creation_method_themebook_hint: Answer prompts to craft a theme.
Ui.hero_creation_mode_trope_hint: Pick a trope with prebuilt themekits.
Ui.hero_creation_select_trope_hint: Select a trope to see details.
Ui.warn_incompatible_data: Los datos que estás tratando de importar no son compatibles con este sistema.
Ui.warn_no_character: Asigna un personaje a tu usuario en el menú de configuración de jugadores en la esquina inferior izquierda.
Ui.warn_not_owner: No eres el propietario de este actor. No puedes editarlo.
Ui.welcome_custom_dice_hint: Use the custom Legend in the Mist dice visuals instead of standard d6s.
Ui.welcome_popout_tags_hint: Automatically open the Tags sidebar in a pop-out window on load.
Ui.welcome_player_message: Welcome, adventurer! It looks like you don't have a hero yet. Would you like to create one?
Ui.gm_welcome_message: Welcome to Legend in the Mist! Here are a few things to set up before your players join.
Ui.warn_theme_limit: Has llegado al número máximo de temas. Por favor, elimina un tema antes de añadir otro.
Ui.migration_start: Migrating world data — please do not close the application.
Ui.migration_failed: World migration failed — check the console for details.
Ui.hero_creation_hint_power_tags: Power tags should be useful — ask yourself: "What kind of actions would this tag support?"
Ui.hero_creation_hint_weakness_tags: Weakness tags should be limiting — ask yourself: "How would this cause problems for my hero?"
Ui.hero_creation_hint_tags_match_might: Tags should match theme Might: Origin = humble, Adventure = notable, Greatness = grandiose.
Ui.hero_creation_hint_quest: A Quest is a goal, belief, or journey. Think: Your Wish, Your Truth, Your Home, or Your Question.
Ui.hero_creation_hint_broad_vs_specific: Broad tags (e.g. clever) need extra effort to use. Specific tags (e.g. whirlwind slash) are more reliable.
Ui.no_addons: No add-ons applied. Drop one here from the compendium.
